description: Forward-test prompts for the Codex-native skill surface. Each case should be usable by a fresh Codex session without hidden context.

cases.prompt: Use Codex Game Studio to adopt this existing game project, infer its current phase, identify missing artifacts, and recommend the next playable step.
expected_evidence: Lists inspected artifacts or missing artifacts
Routes to one or more follow-up skills
Gives one small next step with validation

cases.prompt: Draft a compact game concept and core loop for a two-week prototype, then identify the top design risks and playtest questions.
expected_evidence: States player promise and target experience
Defines core loop and success criteria

cases.prompt: Create an ADR for save data, scene loading, and platform storage risk in a small Godot game.
Turn this loose game idea into a vertical-slice plan with milestones, tasks, acceptance criteria, and a smoke test path.
expected_evidence: Includes a run or verification path

cases.prompt: Review whether this project can move from prototype to vertical slice and return PASS, CONCERNS, or FAIL with required evidence.
Create a smoke test and regression checklist for a playable build, including evidence to capture before release review.
Prepare a release checklist, known issues note, patch notes outline, and hotfix triage plan for an indie game build.
